rationale: Adds a new `.github/workflows/gem-push.yml` GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes a Ruby gem to both GitHub Packages (GPR) and RubyGems on push/PR against main. The workflow uses `actions/checkout@v4`, pins `ruby/setup-ruby` to a specific SHA (`55283cc23133118229fd3f97f9336ee23a179fcf`) at Ruby 2.6.x, builds the gemspec, and pushes with secret-derived API keys. This is the standard ruby/setup-ruby template wired to RUBYGEMS_AUTH_TOKEN; despite the PR being a multi-level revert chain in `negatives/reverted/`, the diff itself is a legitimate CI workflow addition with no cheat patterns or hallucinated dependencies.
